title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Panalpina India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Panalpina India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Panalpina India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Panalpina India:
Panalpina India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panalpina India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
